name: Data Transmission
genre_focus: house; tech house; deep tech; techno
requirements: Private SoundCloud link preferred | Include press release and artist bio | House / Tech House / Deep Tech / Techno only for this contact
reach: 100k+ monthly site visitors; large SoundCloud following
why: One of the UK's leading online dance music authorities with a dedicated premieres section for house and tech house. Grahame Farmer personally curates house/tech-house premieres, giving unknown acts a real editorial slot with SoundCloud upload and site coverage.

name: Magnetic Magazine
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; deep house
requirements: Press release | High-res press photos | Private streaming link | Artist bio and social links
reach: 500k+ monthly unique visitors
why: US-based music and culture magazine with dedicated tech-house track roundups published monthly in 2025. Features premieres and reviews; actively accepts submissions from independent artists and labels. Monthly 'Best Tech House Tracks' columns give rising artists real visibility.

name: DJ Mag
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; electronic
requirements: Press release | High-res artist photo and packshot | Artist bio and social links | Private SoundCloud link with downloads enabled (320kbps) or fatdrop link — no Dropbox/WeTransfer | Pre-order or buy link if applicable | Suggested run date | Pitch window: no earlier than 3 weeks before release; no later than 2 days before
reach: 3M+ monthly site visitors; global print and digital readership
why: The world's most widely read DJ and dance music magazine. Premieres one track per day online, featuring lesser-known acts alongside established names. A premiere slot here signals credibility to bookers and labels globally.

name: Mixmag Australia / NZ
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; electronic
requirements: Brief pitch explaining desired coverage type (premiere / review / playlist / mix) | Private streaming link | Press release and bio
reach: Mixmag global brand; ANZ SoundCloud premiere playlists active 2025
why: Active offshoot of the world's biggest dance music brand, explicitly calling for music submissions from any artist — known or unknown — for premieres, playlists, mixes, and reviews. Lower bar than UK flagship but carries global Mixmag brand weight and publishes monthly SoundCloud premiere playlists.

name: Mixmag (UK / Global)
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; electronic
requirements: Press release | High-res photos | Private streaming link | Artist bio and socials | Pitch 1 to 3 weeks before release
reach: 5M+ monthly unique visitors; 1.4M+ Instagram followers
why: The flagship global dance music magazine reaching 5M+ monthly visitors. Being premiered or reviewed on Mixmag.net is among the most valuable press placements for any house/tech-house artist. Active in 2025 with weekly new music coverage.

name: When We Dip
genre_focus: house; deep house; progressive house; melodic techno
requirements: SoundCloud track link preferred | Press release or brief pitch | Desired premiere date
reach: Established underground readership; active SoundCloud and social channels
why: Active dance music magazine (Montreal / Dublin / Berlin) running frequent exclusive premieres of independent house and progressive tracks. Well-regarded in the underground scene with consistent editorial output throughout 2025. A premier here reaches a tuned-in global audience.

name: Deep House Amsterdam
genre_focus: deep house; house
requirements: SoundCloud link only (Dropbox not accepted) | Listen to DHA AM and DHA FM channels first to understand their sound direction
reach: 400k+ YouTube subscribers; 200k+ SoundCloud followers
why: Leading Amsterdam-based deep house blog with 400k+ YouTube subscribers and 200k+ SoundCloud followers across DHA AM and DHA FM channels. Features exclusive premieres and label showcases. Active site with 2026 content confirmed. Ideal for deep-leaning house tracks.

name: The Groove Cartel
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; deep house; progressive house
requirements: Track link | Artist bio | Social links | SubmitHub preferred for guaranteed 48-hour response and feedback
reach: 50k+ unique monthly visitors; Google News indexed
why: Quintessential electronic music blog and network with 50k+ unique monthly visitors, indexed on Google News. Actively accepts submissions from unknown artists via SubmitHub (guaranteed feedback within 48 hours) and direct email. Strong fit for tech house specifically.

name: EARMILK
genre_focus: electronic; house; deep house; dance
requirements: Submit via SubmitHub or Pillargram only | No direct email submissions accepted — filtered automatically
reach: Millions of global readers across 110+ countries
why: Global music blog active since late 2000s reaching millions of readers in 110+ countries. Covers electronic dance music with a dedicated electronic section and premieres new tracks. Submission via SubmitHub is straightforward and open to all artists.

name: Decoded Magazine
genre_focus: house; techno; deep house; progressive house; melodic techno
requirements: Include artist bio and press release | Mark clearly as a premiere request in subject line | Address to Ian French for A&R/Editorial/Premiere pitches | Note: they do NOT accept mixes or unreleased material via submit@ — for premieres, pitch to Ian French directly
reach: Established underground readership; active YouTube, SoundCloud, and social channels
why: Underground electronic music magazine with a dedicated premieres section, Mix of the Month competition open to unknowns, and a Discord community for submissions. Active with premieres confirmed through June 2026. Ian French handles A&R, editorial, and premieres.

name: Le Visiteur Online
genre_focus: house; deep house; disco house; nu-disco; boogie
requirements: Submit via SubmitHub only — direct submissions no longer accepted | Must be house, disco house, nu-disco, or boogie in style
reach: Thousands of unique weekly visitors; large SoundCloud following
why: One of the internet's biggest house and disco authorities, run by UK DJ/producer/blogger John Hutchison. Receives thousands of unique visitors weekly. Features premieres, interviews, and mixes. SubmitHub is now the only submission route.

name: Resident Advisor (RA)
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; electronic
requirements: RA account login required for the feature pitch form | For release reviews: pitch via feedback@ra.co specifying which release and why it is noteworthy | For feature pitches: use ra.co/pitch/feature with a 4 to 5 sentence explanation of the artist/topic's relevance | Long-form features, release reviews, opinion pieces, and video essays accepted
reach: 8M+ monthly unique visitors; definitive global underground electronic music authority
why: The world's leading electronic music magazine and event platform. RA singles reviews, features, and premieres carry enormous credibility globally. Open to pitches for release reviews and features from anyone. The 'Singles Reviews' section and 'Breaking Through' series are the most accessible entry points for unknown artists.

name: 6AM Group
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno
requirements: High-quality original house or techno track | Allow at least 2 weeks for completion | Paid service: Basic Premiere $49 (SoundCloud upload only), Standard Premiere $99 (SoundCloud + site post + social), Press/Editorial Feature $39
reach: Large social following; active Discord community; established underground audience
why: US-based underground electronic media platform featuring premieres, interviews, guest mixes, and editorial coverage of house and techno. Content-promo service routes tracks to their editorial team and SoundCloud channel. Paid tier makes placement predictable with a modest budget.

name: House Music With Love (HMWL)
genre_focus: deep house; afro house; organic house; melodic house; melodic techno
requirements: SoundCloud or Dropbox link only | Specify release date for premiere requests | Must fit: Afro House, Organic House, Deep House, Melodic House & Techno, or Electronica
reach: Claims 12M+ followers across channels; active Spotify playlists and SoundCloud
why: Swedish house music blog, record label, and repost network active since 2008. Offers blog reviews, YouTube/SoundCloud premieres, and Spotify playlist placements to a self-described 12M+ follower audience. An accessible launch platform for deep/melodic house and organic house tracks from completely unknown artists.

name: This Song Is Sick
genre_focus: electronic; house; deep house; dance; indie
requirements: Submit via SubmitHub only — no direct email accepted | Electronic, house, indie, hip-hop accepted
reach: Global readership in 110+ countries; long-running social presence
why: Established US music discovery blog active since 2010 with a dedicated premieres section and global readership in 110+ countries. Covers electronic, house, and dance music alongside indie and hip-hop. Most recent premiere confirmed May 2025. SubmitHub submission is open to all artists.

name: We Rave You
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; electronic
requirements: Artist name | Email address | Track URL | Brief message describing the track and request
reach: 35M+ monthly content reach; 1M+ followers
why: Large-scale electronic music media brand with 35M+ monthly content reach and 1M+ followers. Runs a recurring 'House & Techno Picks' editorial series (confirmed June 2025) showcasing independent artists. Artist submission form on contact page assigns a dedicated consultant per submission.

name: Spotify for Artists — Editorial Pitch
genre_focus: house; tech house; electronic
requirements: Music must be distributed to Spotify via any distributor | Must pitch at least 7 days before release date (28 days strongly recommended for unknowns) | Only unreleased tracks eligible — pitch disappears once track is live | One track pitch per release; cannot pitch compilations or featured-artist slots | Complete pitch form: genre, mood, instruments, 500-character story about the song | Artist profile must be complete — bio, press photo, linked socials
reach: Editorial playlists range from thousands to millions of followers; Release Radar reaches every artist follower
why: The only official, free route to Spotify's in-house editorial team. A placement on a Spotify editorial playlist (e.g. 'Mint', 'Dance Brandneu') can deliver tens of thousands of streams overnight and kick-start the algorithm for an unknown artist.

name: SubmitHub — Playlist Curator Network
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; electronic
requirements: Create a free artist account on submithub.com | Upload or link Spotify/SoundCloud track | Filter curators by genre (techno-house, deep tech, electronic) | Write a 200-character pitch for each submission | Free submissions: curators have 20 days to respond, no feedback obligation | Premium credits ($0.79–$3 each, bulk discounts): 48-hr response + written feedback guaranteed
reach: 6,000+ active curators; individual playlists range from 1K to 500K+ followers
why: Largest curator marketplace with 6,000+ active curators. Has a dedicated tech house / techno-house filter, making it one of the most targeted discovery tools for an unknown house producer. Free tier available; paid tier guarantees 48-hr feedback.

name: Groover — House & Tech House Curators
genre_focus: house; tech house; afro house; deep house; melodic house
requirements: Create a Groover account at groover.co | Purchase Grooviz credits (€46 starter pack = 46 Grooviz; bulk saves up to 24%) | Each curator contact costs 2 Grooviz (~€2); premium curators 4–6 Grooviz | Select curators filtered by 'tech-house' or 'house music' tags | Submit track link and write a short pitch | Response guaranteed within 7 days — refund issued if curator fails to respond
reach: 141+ house-tagged curators; 76+ tech-house-tagged curators; individual contacts vary from micro-playlists to 100K+ follower channels
why: Paris-based platform with 4,000+ music pros. Has an explicit tech-house curator filter and a dedicated 'HOUSE 2025 | Tech House & Club Music' Spotify-certified playlist. Every submission is guaranteed a written reply within 7 days or credits are refunded — de-risks spending for an unknown artist.

name: Playlist Push — Spotify Curator Campaigns
genre_focus: house; tech house; electronic; EDM
requirements: Create account at playlistpush.com | Submit track details: Spotify link, genre, mood, language, release date, short description | Select campaign size — minimum $285 for Spotify campaigns | Pre-release campaigns available up to 14 days before drop date | Track must be on Spotify (released or scheduled)
reach: 1,000+ curators; total combined reach ~23 million Spotify listeners
why: Vetted network of 1,000+ independent Spotify playlist curators with verified organic engagement. Campaigns run for two weeks, matching the track to genre-relevant curators. Pre-release campaigns can drive saves/streams in the critical first 48 hours of release — very important for Spotify's algorithm.

name: Soundplate — House / Electronic Playlist Submission
genre_focus: house; tech house; deep house; electronic; dance
requirements: Browse curated playlists at soundplate.com/new-spotify-playlists1/electronic-dance/ | Listen to playlists first to confirm genre fit | Click 'Submit Music' on chosen playlist page | Sign in with Spotify to submit (platform auto-follows the playlist) | Submit one track at a time — quality over quantity
reach: Hundreds of independent Spotify curators on platform; individual playlists range from 500 to 100K+ followers
why: Free platform dedicated to connecting electronic / house music artists with independent Spotify curators. Has a specific 'House / Electronic / Dance Music' submission section with dozens of curators. No account needed for basic discovery; Spotify login required to submit. Ideal low-barrier starting point for an unknown artist with no budget.

name: Daily Playlists — Spotify Curator Marketplace
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; electronic; dance
requirements: Create free account at dailyplaylists.com | Connect Spotify account via Spotify authenticator | Search/paste Spotify track URL | Filter playlists by genre (house, tech house, electronic) | Use 20 free Standard credits per week (reset every Monday) | Premium credits available for purchase for larger campaigns
reach: 18,000+ playlists; 40,000+ curators; top house playlists on platform: 60K–190K followers
why: One of the largest free playlist submission networks (18,000+ playlists, 40,000+ curators). Hands out 20 free Standard credits per week per artist — meaning an unknown producer can start submitting at zero cost. Has a dedicated house genre filter and actively lists curated top-10 house playlists available for free submission.

name: SoundCampaign (SoundCamps) — Spotify Curator Matching
genre_focus: house; tech house; electronic
requirements: Create account at soundcamps.com | Set a campaign budget (no minimum stated; ~£150 to reach ~21 curators typical) | Select genre and sub-genre to narrow curator matching | Platform auto-matches and distributes track to curators | Only pay when curator reviews the submission or a TikTok video is delivered
reach: Curated network of verified Spotify playlist curators; typical campaign reaches 15–50 curators
why: Transparent, budget-controlled platform that auto-matches tracks to Spotify playlist curators and only charges when submissions are reviewed. Sub-genre selection available, so a house/tech house producer can narrow targeting. Curators are compensated for reviews, which keeps response rates high. Good secondary platform to diversify beyond SubmitHub and Groover.

name: One Submit — Spotify Playlist & Blog Promotion
genre_focus: house; tech house; electronic; techno
requirements: Create account at one-submit.com | Select Spotify track link | Choose playlist size tier: up to 8K followers = $3; 8K–20K = $6 per submission | Each campaign runs for 10 days | Refund issued if curator does not respond within 10 days
reach: 2,200+ curators on platform; individual playlist curators range from 1K to 100K+ followers
why: Pay-per-submission platform with 2,200+ Spotify playlist curators. Artists choose playlists by follower size and only pay for what they target. Has a tech-house-to-Afro-house cross-genre submission route verified on the site ('Submit Tech House to Afrohouse Chill Sunset'). Ranked best Spotify promotion service by several music industry outlets in 2025.

name: Electronic Radar — House & Tech House Submission
genre_focus: house; tech house; deep tech; techno; afro house; jackin house
requirements: Send Spotify link only (no other platform links) | Track must be released in 2025 or 2026 (current year) | Electronic music genres only — house, tech house, techno and subgenres | Free submission — no charge
reach: 17 curated Spotify playlists; overall scale is small/emerging but genre-targeted
why: Small but genre-focused independent curator running 17 Spotify playlists specifically for techno and house subgenres including 'House Radar', 'Tech House Radar', 'Deep Tech', 'Jackin House', 'Afro Energy'. Accepts free email submissions from any indie artist with a 2025 Spotify release — exactly the kind of niche, accessible outlet an unknown artist needs.

name: Indiemono — Pop / EDM & Chill Playlist Submission
genre_focus: electronic; house (chill); deep house; dance; EDM
requirements: Submit via form at indiemono.com/music-submit/ | Choose the genre box that best fits your track (Pop/EDM or Chill for house music) | Submit once — Indiemono routes internally across multiple playlists | Track to Spotify for Artists to monitor placement
reach: 100+ playlists; 3M+ combined playlist followers across Spotify, Deezer, and Apple Music
why: Free, editorial submission system across 100+ curated playlists with 3M+ playlist followers. Covers Chill Deep House and Dance/EDM categories that intersect with house music. Submission is free, editorial, and requires zero marketing spend — a safe no-cost channel for any unknown artist to attempt.

name: Tech Me Home — House & Techno Promotion
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; afro house; minimal; melodic house
requirements: Complete submission form at techmehomechannel.com/submit-your-song | House, techno, and underground electronic music only | Response within 48 hours (up to 72 hours during busy periods)
reach: Network of DJs, radio hosts and producers on Inflyte; curated Spotify playlists for house/techno audience
why: Dedicated house/techno promotion service offering Spotify playlisting, Inflyte DJ campaigns, and press services. Minimum 28-day playlist placement per track. Specialist in underground electronic genres with direct DJ outreach — useful for an artist trying to get tracks into professional DJ sets as well as playlists.

name: Apple Music Pitch (via Distributor / Apple Music Connect)
genre_focus: house; tech house; electronic
requirements: Music distributed to Apple Music via a distributor partner with Apple Music Connect access | Pitch submitted by distributor at least 10 days before release (7-day minimum for late adds) | Provide: content format, track name, mood, genre, language, release date, campaign details | Note any focus/feeler track if part of an EP or album | Artist biography not required — campaign context is more important
reach: Apple Music editorial playlists can reach millions of subscribers globally; 'A-List: Electronic' is a top-tier flagship playlist
why: Apple Music's editorial team curates high-profile playlists (e.g. 'A-List: Electronic'). While direct access is restricted to distributor partners, many indie distributors (TuneCore, DistroKid, Amuse, CD Baby) now offer Apple Music editorial pitching as part of their release flow — making this accessible to a solo artist with any reputable distributor.

name: MusoSoup — Music Promotion Marketplace
genre_focus: electronic; house; indie electronic
requirements: Create artist account at musosoup.com | Pay one-off campaign fee from £42 | Upload release details (up to 90 days before release date) | Curators browse and send offers — accept or decline paid/free coverage | No ongoing subscription needed
reach: Hundreds of verified curators; covers Spotify playlists, blogs, radio, and social features across multiple genres
why: Unique reverse-pitch model: curators browse and contact artists they like, rather than artists cold-pitching. A single one-off fee gives 90 days of visibility to the curator pool. Covers Spotify playlists, blog reviews, radio airplay, and social media features — broader than playlist-only platforms.

name: Beatport / Beatportal — Editorial Pitching for DJ Store
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; deep house
requirements: Distribute to Beatport via TuneCore, DistroKid, or MusicHub (no label required) | Pitch for editorial features through your distributor's label manager contact at Beatport | Pitch 3–4 weeks before release for full editorial consideration | Can enter remix contests via LabelRadar (free) | Apply annually for Beatport Next artist development program | Social Spotlight (Drop of the Week, Studio Jam) can be pitched via Beatport's social channels
reach: Millions of DJs and electronic music fans globally; Tech House Top 100 and Hype charts are watched by working DJs worldwide
why: Beatport is the #1 download store for DJs and the definitive platform for house/tech-house discovery by professional DJs. Editorial features on Beatportal (Artist of Month, Playlist of Week, track breakdowns) directly influence DJ chart picks and festival bookings. Beatport Hype chart is specifically for emerging artists. Independent artists can distribute to Beatport without a label via TuneCore, DistroKid, or MusicHub.

name: Deeper Shades of House
genre_focus: deep house; afro house; house
requirements: Contact Lars first via the site form with links to recent mixes and a bio before sending the full mix | Mix must be EXCLUSIVE — not broadcast or uploaded elsewhere before or after | WAV, AIFF, or 320kbps MP3 minimum; minimum 60 minutes | At least 4dB headroom (do not peak at 0dB) | No AI-produced music in the mix | No voiceovers, jingles, or station IDs | Full tracklist in format: Artist – Title (Remix) – Label | Short bio, social/website links, two high-quality photos | File named: DJName-MixTitle.mp3 with ID3 tags
reach: 500k+ podcast subscribers; 140k+ Mixcloud followers
why: Long-running weekly podcast (900+ episodes) hosted by Lars Behrenroth; actively invites guest mixes from lesser-known producers via a public submission page — one of the few major house podcasts with an explicit open-submission policy for unknowns.

name: When We Dip – Prima Lux Mix Series
genre_focus: melodic house; deep house; house
requirements: Submit mix link (SoundCloud/streaming) and bio | Relevant to deep/melodic house spectrum | Original, exclusive or premiere-quality mix preferred
reach: Magazine readership 50k+; active global social following; SoundCloud Prima Lux playlist 5k+ followers
why: Active dance music magazine (Montreal/Dublin/Berlin) running the 'Prima Lux' dedicated emerging-artist mix series — episodes published as recently as May 2026, confirming the series actively curates lesser-known DJs. The main When We Dip Mix series (episodes 170-188+ in 2025-2026) runs in parallel for more established names.

name: 6AM Group (SIX AM) – Guest Mix Series
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; electronic
requirements: Submit inquiry via the contact form on the About page at 6amgroup.com/about | Include mix link, bio, and social media profiles | Mix should showcase a unique sound
reach: Major US EDM media platform; 100k+ social followers across channels
why: Weekly guest mix series on a major US electronic music media platform; features a wide range of emerging artists (Nikka Lorak, Konrad James, DJ Nikadeemas, Angel Parilli) alongside established names — accessible to unknowns willing to pitch via contact form or social DM.

name: Proton Radio – Bedroom Bedlam / Guest Mix
genre_focus: house; tech house; progressive house; techno; minimal
requirements: Private SoundCloud link to your mix with downloads enabled | Tracklist formatted as: 01. Artist - Track (Mix) [Label] | Send to demos@protonradio.com
reach: Global underground EDM audience; 200+ shows; 50k+ SoundCloud followers
why: Long-standing internet radio station dedicated to underground dance music with 200+ shows; 'Bedroom Bedlam' is an open-submission vehicle specifically designed to introduce lesser-known talent; successful demos can lead to ongoing residencies. Active tech house genre page confirmed 2025.

name: Frisky Radio – Feelin' Frisky Broadcasts
genre_focus: house; deep house; progressive house; techno
requirements: Email submit@friskyradio.com with a WeTansfer or streaming link in the email body | Include name, email, genre of the mix, and a brief bio | MP3 only — no WAV files, no email attachments | Do not contact via social media — email only | No guaranteed reply — only hear back if selected
reach: Specialist underground radio audience; active since 2000; 30k+ social following
why: Underground electronic music radio station with a curated 1-hour guest mix slot ('Feelin' Frisky') explicitly open to unsolicited submissions from DJs — one of the clearest open-door submission paths in the underground electronic space.

name: Data Transmission – Spotlight Mix Series
genre_focus: house; tech house; deep tech; techno
requirements: Email Grahame Farmer (Editor-in-Chief) at grahame@datatransmission.co | Specify genre (house, tech house, deep tech, or techno) | Include streaming link to your mix and an artist bio | Longer interview/feature pitches also accepted separately
reach: Major dance music media site; 50k+ SoundCloud followers; global readership
why: Established online dance music authority with a regularly updated Spotlight Mix Series (active through Sept 2025) featuring artists from emerging to established; editorial contact is public and directly accessible to independent artists.

name: Magnetic Magazine – Guest Podcast Series
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; electronic
requirements: Submit a streaming link to your mix (no MP3 attachments) | Include full contact details | Fresh, original-angle pitches preferred | Editorial team curates — not all submissions published
reach: Global EDM readership 100k+; 200k+ social following
why: US-based electronic music magazine (Beverly Hills) with an established guest podcast series; submission policy is publicly documented and allows emerging artist pitches via email with a streaming link — no attachment required.

name: NTS Radio – Supporter Radio Mix Programme
genre_focus: house; techno; electronic; experimental
requirements: Must be an NTS Supporter (membership from £3.99/month or ~£54/year) | Watch for submission window announcements via newsletter and @nts_radio Instagram | Mix strictly 55–60 minutes long, submitted as an MP3 | No genre restrictions — any electronic style welcome | Only one mix per applicant selected if multiple submitted
reach: Global audience; NTS streams to 6M+ listeners per month; archived mixes remain on site
why: London-based broadcaster NTS opens a mix-submission programme several times per year exclusively to its supporters (paying members); selected mixes broadcast live and archived alongside resident programming — a legitimate, structured route for an unknown to get a mix on a globally respected radio platform.

name: Electronic Groove – EG Podcast
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; progressive house; deep house
requirements: Email contact@electronicgroove.com with a streaming link to your mix and artist bio | Note your pitch is for the EG Podcast guest slot | No dedicated submission form — general contact email used for editorial pitches
reach: 1072+ episodes; Mixcloud followers 30k+; Apple Podcasts listed; global electronic music readership
why: Long-running electronic music magazine podcast (1072+ episodes as of June 2026) that regularly features both established and emerging artists (e.g. Diass, Lannka, Adapter, Charles Meyer alongside Steve Lawler, Cattáneo); general contact email accepted for guest mix pitches.

name: MIL-MGMT (Music Is Love Management)
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; electronic
requirements: Submit private link or download of track(s) | Provide release date, label and catalog details, and campaign objectives | Submit at least 6 weeks before release date | Select and pay for campaign tier via website checkout
reach: Network of DJs, specialist radio shows, press outlets, and playlist curators in house/techno space
why: Manchester-based PR firm with 10+ years specialising exclusively in house, techno and electronic music; offers tiered campaigns (DJ promo, radio plugging, press coverage) designed for independent artists and labels — the most accessible entry-level pricing in the sector (£110 for DJ-only EP campaign).

name: Reach Promo
genre_focus: deep house; tech house; techno; minimal
requirements: Email info@reach-promo.agency to check if music fits their service | Music must fit deep house / tech house / techno/minimal genres | Submit private streaming link for review before purchasing campaign
reach: Curated pool of DJs, radio shows, and blogs in deep house/tech house/techno scene globally
why: Italy-based specialist PR agency and promo pool focused exclusively on deep house, tech house, and techno/minimal; affordable tiered campaigns (from €80) covering DJ outreach, radio promotion, blog/magazine pitching, and Spotify playlist submission — lowest entry cost among verified house-specific PR agencies.

name: Infectious PR
genre_focus: dance; electronic; house; pop
requirements: Email newbiz@infectiouspr.com with artist info and a streaming link to your music | Briefly describe your project and campaign goals
reach: Global media network; BBC, Forbes, Billboard, Apple Music, Spotify coverage capacity
why: Bristol-based marketing and PR agency (founded 2009, 30 years combined experience) with global media network including BBC, Forbes, Billboard, Apple Music, and Spotify; explicitly invites new project inquiries from emerging artists via their public new-business email.

name: Motormouthmedia
genre_focus: electronic; indie electronic; underground dance
requirements: Email submissions@motormouthmedia.com with project info and a streaming link | High submission volume — no reply indicates project is not a fit
reach: US and international indie/electronic tastemaker press; established booking and label contacts
why: LA/Brooklyn boutique PR firm (founded late 1990s) that has championed underground electronic acts since the beginning — was the first American independent PR firm to represent Warp Records, Ninja Tune, Planet Mu; broke Four Tet, Caribou, Flying Lotus from day one; accepts new inquiries.

name: Dispersion PR
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno; electronic
requirements: Email info@dispersionpr.com with artist/release info | Include streaming link and campaign goals | Specify release date and label context
reach: UK and European press, radio, and club circuit; BBC Radio 1 Dance history
why: UK specialist electronic music PR firm (founded 2007 by Julian Shay and Dean Muhsin) offering press, radio, and club promo for artists and labels. Client history includes Hot Creations, Crosstown Rebels, Cocoon, Defected, Laurent Garnier, Michael Bibi, Chris Liebing — working with Dispersion signals credibility in the underground house/techno circuit.

name: MCPR (Matt Caldwell PR)
genre_focus: electronic; house; techno; dance
requirements: Email info@mattcaldwell.co.uk or use the contact form at mattcaldwell.co.uk/contact/ | Include project details, streaming link, and campaign scope
reach: International electronic music press, radio, and industry network; 12+ years established
why: Full-service 360-degree electronic music agency (12+ years, global presence) offering PR, radio promo, social media, A&R consultancy, and artist progression — contact email and phone publicly listed; targets both emerging and established electronic artists.

name: Prescription Music PR
genre_focus: electronic; ambient; house; dance
requirements: Submit via the general enquiries form at prescriptionmusicpruk.com/general-enquiries | Include artist info, release details, and campaign objectives
reach: UK, European, and Irish music press and radio
why: Leading UK electronic and ambient music PR agency with offices in London, Cambridge, and Manchester; explicitly lists electronic music PR among services and has a public inquiry form for new campaign submissions — accessible to independent artists.

name: Groove Magazin – Resident Podcast
genre_focus: techno; house; electronic
requirements: Email max@groove.de (Events/Podcast contact: Maximilian Fritz) | Pitch yourself as a club resident or party organizer in a specific city/venue | Include streaming link to your mix and relevant club/party context | Note: primary focus is German-speaking regions and Eastern Europe — Tunis-based artists should pitch their regional/local residency angle if applicable
reach: Established German-language electronic music magazine; Mixcloud 50k+ followers; SoundCloud Resident Podcast playlist active
why: Berlin-based bi-monthly podcast (episode 064 published June 2026, confirming active status) featuring grassroots underground residents from clubs in German-speaking countries and Eastern Europe — focuses on local club culture figures rather than superstars. Podcast contact is publicly available via editorial email.

name: Rinse FM
genre_focus: house; tech house; dubstep; grime; electronica
requirements: Private SoundCloud link only (no file attachments) | Include brief artist bio and genre info
reach: Online + 103.7 FM London; global streaming audience; tens of thousands weekly listeners
why: Rinse FM is the UK's most influential underground radio station with 30+ years of history. Its shows are curated by individual DJs who actively seek fresh tracks — emailing thelinkup@rinse.fm with a private SoundCloud link is a direct route to DJ inboxes that spin house and tech house.

name: Defected Radio
genre_focus: house; deep house; soulful house
requirements: Streaming link with download option | Brief bio (1 paragraph) | Social media links | No attachments — streaming link only | Track must be original, not a bootleg or mashup
reach: 2M+ SoundCloud followers; Spotify editorial placement; syndicated to 70+ stations
why: Defected Radio is the world's most-listened-to house music radio show, syndicated globally. Sending a promo to Defected's demos portal (LabelRadar) is the official route to reaching their A&R and radio team — tracks featured can go on air and to their 2M+ SoundCloud followers.

name: Proton Radio — Bedroom Bedlam
genre_focus: house; tech house; deep house; progressive house; breaks; techno
requirements: Private SoundCloud link with downloads enabled | Tracklist formatted as: 01. Artist - Track (Mix) [Label] | Include artist bio and genre info
reach: 200+ exclusive shows; global internet radio audience; SoundCloud/Mixcloud archive
why: Proton Radio is one of the longest-running underground electronic internet radio networks with 200+ exclusive shows. 'Bedroom Bedlam' is specifically the submission-friendly show that airs sets from emerging DJs — it is the documented front door for unknowns.

name: Frisky Radio — Feelin' Frisky
genre_focus: house; tech house; progressive house; deep house; techno
requirements: MP3 only (no WAV) | 320 kbps quality | Upload to WeTransfer — do NOT use SoundCloud, Mediafire or similar | Include: your name, email, genre of mix, and brief bio | Full 1-hour set required
reach: One of the largest underground electronic internet radio platforms; global audience; podcast distribution
why: Frisky Radio is a globally-streamed curated electronic music internet radio. 'Feelin' Frisky' is their dedicated guest slot for emerging DJs — it is the official, documented submission route for artists without an existing residency. A successful set can lead to a full residency offer.

name: Foundation FM
genre_focus: house; tech house; deep house; electronic; garage
requirements: Show/mix proposal describing your concept | SoundCloud or Mixcloud demo link recommended | Include artist bio and social links
reach: London-based online station with growing global listenership; active SoundCloud and Mixcloud presence
why: Foundation FM is a female-led independent London station championing underrepresented voices and emerging artists in underground electronic music. It actively curates new talent via a dedicated show submissions contact and has a track record of platforming unknowns.

name: NTS Radio — Show Proposal / Supporter Radio
genre_focus: house; tech house; electronic; experimental; all genres
requirements: Show proposal: describe concept in up to 600 characters, list up to 5 genres, provide up to 3 demo links (SoundCloud/Mixcloud/YouTube) | Supporter Radio: must be NTS Supporter (paid subscriber); 55–60 minute mix as MP3; submissions align with an announced theme
reach: Millions of monthly listeners globally; 24/7 streaming; extensive archive
why: NTS is one of the world's top independent online radio stations broadcasting 24/7. It has two documented entry routes for unknowns: (1) free show proposals via their website form, and (2) NTS Supporter Radio — a paid subscription scheme that opens mix submission rounds several times per year, with selected mixes broadcast and archived.

name: Worldwide FM
genre_focus: house; deep house; soul; jazz; world; electronic
requirements: Detailed show proposal: concept, planned guests for 6 months, specialty, genre focus, why it is original | Music submission via streaming link | Show must offer something distinct from existing programming
reach: Global online audience; associated with Gilles Peterson's worldwide network; Mixcloud archive
why: Worldwide FM (Gilles Peterson) champions underground and global music culture. Their contact page invites show proposals and music submissions. The station has a history of platforming emerging artists and international talent, making it realistic for a Tunisian producer to pitch a culturally distinctive show concept.

name: Ibiza Live Radio — New Talent Show
genre_focus: house; deep house; tech house; electronic
requirements: Upload mix or demo track via upload portal at ibizaliveradio.affekt.de/upload-area | Include artist info and project description | Mix/set format preferred
reach: Online + Ibiza FM; growing international listenership; active social media
why: Ibiza Live Radio runs a monthly 'New Talent Show' competition specifically for unknown DJs and producers — the winning mix gets broadcast and the artist is featured as a guest. This is one of the most direct, documented routes for an unknown to get airplay on an Ibiza-branded station.

name: Ibiza Global Radio
genre_focus: house; tech house; electronic; Ibiza club sounds
requirements: DJ mix or show proposal via email | Include artist bio, SoundCloud/streaming link | Specify genre and concept
reach: 100.8 FM Ibiza + global web streaming; 186K+ Instagram followers; international syndication
why: Ibiza Global Radio is a 24/7 broadcast station (100.8 FM Ibiza) streaming the best international DJs and electronic music. Reaching them via their contact email is a real route to pitch DJ mix shows or promos to their programming team.

name: Passion Ibiza Radio
genre_focus: house; soulful house; disco; tech house; deep house; afro house; melodic house
requirements: 60-minute pre-recorded show or continuous mix | MP3 at 320 kbps | SoundCloud download link | Include name, email, optional Facebook/Instagram links
reach: Online radio with Mixcloud/SoundCloud presence; Ibiza-focused audience; active as of June 2025
why: Passion Ibiza Radio has a fully open, documented demo submission form for emerging DJs — one of the most directly accessible Ibiza-branded stations. They actively seek quality house DJs and presenters and accept continuous mix submissions.

name: BBC Introducing
platform: FM / BBC Radio 1 / BBC Radio 6 Music / web
genre_focus: house; electronic; all genres (routed by region/genre)
requirements: Create a free BBC account | Upload WAV or MP3 file (up to 2 tracks per upload cycle) | Complete artist profile: name, genre, postcode, bio, photo (1920x1080px recommended) | Upload clean version only — no explicit lyrics | Add PRS Tunecode if applicable
reach: BBC Radio 1, Radio 6 Music, 1Xtra, 2, and regional stations; millions of listeners
why: BBC Introducing is the official BBC pathway for unsigned/emerging artists to reach BBC Radio 1, Radio 6 Music, 1Xtra, and regional BBC stations. Uploaded tracks are reviewed by producers and can be broadcast nationally. The upload portal is free and open to all UK-based or UK-connected artists. Dance/electronic tracks are routed to relevant shows including Radio 1 Dance.

name: Netil Radio
genre_focus: house; electronic; underground; experimental
requirements: Show proposal describing concept and music policy | Demo mix link (Mixcloud or SoundCloud) | Artist bio and background
reach: Online streaming; Mixcloud archive; London underground music community audience
why: Netil Radio is a Hackney community station broadcasting from a converted shipping container at Netil Market. It actively platforms emerging and underground artists and accepts show proposals via a documented email address. Its community-first ethos makes it more accessible than major stations.

name: Toolroom Radio
genre_focus: tech house; house; techno
requirements: Upload demo via portal at toolroomrecords.com/demos/ | Original productions only (not bootlegs) | Label does not reply to all submissions but will contact if interested
reach: Global podcast; Apple Podcasts, Spotify; Mixcloud archive; 775+ episodes as of 2025
why: Toolroom Radio (presented by Mark Knight) is one of the most respected weekly tech house/house radio shows, broadcast globally with guest mix slots. Submitting demos to Toolroom Records via their online portal is the official route to getting tracks featured on the show.

name: Cr2 Live & Direct Radio Show
genre_focus: house; tech house; techno
requirements: Contact via Cr2 Records general contact page | Include streaming link, release info, and artist bio | Original house/tech house tracks suitable for a global radio audience
reach: 18M+ weekly listeners; 70+ FM stations; 50+ countries; SoundCloud/podcast
why: Mark Brown's Cr2 Live & Direct show reaches 18M+ weekly listeners across 70+ stations in 50+ countries — one of the most syndicated house radio shows globally. Promos submitted and featured here get extraordinary reach for an unknown.

name: Kaluki Radio
genre_focus: tech house; house; techno
requirements: Include a SoundCloud or streaming link to your track or mix | Keep the pitch concise — who you are, what you're sending | Original tech house/house productions
reach: Dedicated tech house fanbase; Apple Podcasts; global streaming; Ibiza presence
why: Kaluki is a Manchester-based independent tech house label and events brand (est. 2006) whose weekly radio podcast is an established community touchpoint. Reaching the label via info@kaluki.co.uk is a direct line to label boss Pirate Copy, who runs the show.

name: Glitterbox Radio
genre_focus: house; disco house; soulful house; classic house
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar at labelradar.com/labels/glitterbox/portal | Streaming link with download option | Brief bio and social links | Track should fit Glitterbox's disco/house/soulful aesthetic
reach: Defected network audience; Mixcloud/SoundCloud; BBC Radio 1 Dance collaborations; global reach
why: Glitterbox Radio (run by Simon Dunmore / Defected sub-brand) is a weekly show celebrating the best in house, disco and dance music, broadcast globally. Submitting via the Defected/LabelRadar portal is the documented route for getting tracks considered for Glitterbox Radio airplay.

name: Selected.
genre_focus: house; deep house; melodic house
requirements: Streamable links only (SoundCloud, YouTube, Dropbox, Google Drive) | Unreleased tracks preferred | Do not chase for a response
reach: Multiple millions of YouTube plays; large SoundCloud following
why: Berlin-founded music blog and label with millions of YouTube views; curates high-quality house tracks for an engaged electronic audience and accepts demos directly from unknowns via its submit page.

name: MrRevillz
genre_focus: house; deep house; dance; electronic
requirements: Submit via the portal (not email for tracks) | Receive email updates on verdict | House, dance, and electronic genres
reach: 3M+ YouTube subscribers; 2B+ total views
why: One of the most established house/dance YouTube channels with 3M+ subscribers and 2B+ total views; runs a dedicated submission portal with feedback to all submitters — very accessible for unknowns.

name: House Nation
genre_focus: house; tech house; deep house
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal | House, tech house, and adjacent electronic genres
reach: ~3.92M YouTube subscribers; 1B+ total views
why: Premier YouTube destination for cutting-edge house music with ~3.9M subscribers and daily uploads; accepts music submissions via LabelRadar portal — one of the clearest open submission routes for independent house producers.

name: The Vibe Guide
genre_focus: house; deep house; indie dance; nu disco; electronic
requirements: House, electronic, indie dance, nu disco, downtempo genres | Submit via portal or email
reach: Large established YouTube audience; active since 2012
why: One of the leading music curators on YouTube since 2012 with a multi-genre scope including house; maintains an open submission portal and email specifically for track submissions by artists at any level.

name: La Belle Musique
genre_focus: house; deep house; chill house; melodic
requirements: Submit via Groover (fee-based per submission) | Beautiful, chill, soulful house vibes preferred | Curators are described as 'very selective'
reach: Millions of YouTube views; active on SoundCloud and Spotify
why: Active since 2013, creates visually immersive house music compilations with large YouTube and SoundCloud audiences; accepts track submissions via Groover (paid, transparent) with a direct promo email as a fallback.

name: Suprafive Music
genre_focus: house; deep house; melodic house; electronic
requirements: Submit via SubmitHub (credits required) | House, deep house, melodic electronic genres | Quality-focused; limited upload volume
reach: Individual tracks/remixes with 20M–40M YouTube views; active Spotify playlist
why: Quality-over-quantity YouTube music blog/label with tracks hitting tens of millions of plays; accepts demos via SubmitHub (credits-based, transparent feedback) and direct email — approachable for unknowns.

name: Future House Cloud
genre_focus: future house; deep house; house
requirements: Future house and deep house genres | Submit via LabelRadar or email
reach: Active YouTube and SoundCloud channel; Spotify playlisting via SubmitHub
why: Independent YouTube label and promo channel focused on future and deep house for emerging artists; has a LabelRadar submission portal and contact email, making it fully open to unknowns.

name: Artist Intelligence Agency (AIA)
genre_focus: house; deep house; electronic; EDM
requirements: Submit via LabelRadar portal | House, deep house, electronic genres
reach: Multiple SoundCloud brand accounts with millions of combined followers across EDM, DeepSounds, IvoryOasis, Future, and other brand channels
why: Operates a matrix of multiple SoundCloud tastemaker brand accounts (EDM, DeepSounds, IvoryOasis, Future, etc.) with millions of combined followers; open demo submissions via LabelRadar portal giving unknowns direct access to a wide repost network.

name: Proximity
genre_focus: melodic house; melodic techno; progressive house; electronic
requirements: Electronic, melodic house, melodic techno, progressive house | Submit via demos.prxmusic.com | High competition: approximately 1-in-500 acceptance rate | Do not send unfinished tracks; avoid multiple submissions per week
reach: 9M YouTube subscribers; 243K Spotify followers; 513 label releases across three labels
why: One of the largest electronic music YouTube channels globally (9M subscribers); runs three labels and accepts demos via a dedicated portal — a massive reach platform for melodic and progressive house tracks.

name: Tech Me Home
genre_focus: tech house; house; deep house; techno
requirements: Tech house, house, deep house, techno genres | Complete the submissions form on their website | Response within 48-72 hours
reach: Active growing YouTube and Spotify promotion channel for underground electronic music
why: Dedicated tech house and house promotion channel with an explicit open submission form and a 48-72 hour response commitment — one of the most accessible and responsive channels in the tech house space for emerging artists.

name: RepostExchange
genre_focus: house; tech house; deep house; electronic
requirements: Connect SoundCloud account | Select a public track and choose target genres including house and tech house | Earn credits by reposting others, or purchase credits | New members get 30 free credits (approx 3,000 SoundCloud user reach)
reach: Thousands of active SoundCloud members; algorithm targets genre-matched audiences
why: Official SoundCloud partner platform (as of Q1 2026) providing free, genre-targeted SoundCloud reposts via a credit economy — the most accessible organic repost tool for any unknown house/tech house producer with a SoundCloud account.
